utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five items, each with detailed descriptions and associated costs. Health coverage includes physical and mental health components with cost (€450/month). Property coverage includes home/contents insurance with cost (€90/month). Travel coverage includes detailed travel insurance with cost (included in health package). Additional services are listed with clear inclusions and cost reference (included in monthly premiums). Total budget provides full monthly and annual cost breakdown. All items are fully specified with the appropriate details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists 'Professional Expatriate Excellence Program' for health, mental, and travel coverage, and 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' for property. The ground-truth ratings do not include a plan named 'Professional Expatriate Excellence Program', but its description (premium global health, mental, and travel integration with specialist access and 24/7 support) aligns with the highest-rated options: 'EliteCare Premium Plan' for both physical and mental health (rating 10 each) and 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' for travel (rating 10). For property, 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' exactly matches a ground-truth entry with rating 10. The 'additional_services' in the plan (24/7 support, concierge, emergency coordination) correspond to the 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 10) and 'Concierge Services' (rating 7) in general/travel services. Therefore, the AI’s selected and implied components map to these ratings.
